title: PWS maternal UPD15 CRISPR epigenome-editing design platform
description: Computational design-prioritization platform for CRISPR epigenome-editing therapy in maternal UPD15 Prader-Willi syndrome. Integrates public multi-omic datasets into an allele-aware GRCh38 PWS-locus digital twin, applies editor-stratified forward models, optimizes hybrid Tet1+VP64 designs, and exports a ranked uncertainty-aware therapeutic catalog with retrospective validation.
